aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Tarheel Comfort due to the lack of structured data and conversational content, but there is potential for improvement.
quick_wins: Add FAQ content with structured FAQPage schema

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-maintained but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: Q&A section is inactive or not utilized

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms
Regularly monitor citations for any potential discrepancies

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local HVAC service queries and 'best HVAC in Gastonia' type searches
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Showcasing certifications, customer testimonials, and detailed service explanations to establish expertise

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for answer engines.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Missing out on 40% of potential leads from AI assistants like ChatGPT and Claude.
agency_pitch.proof_point: The website lacks essential schema markup and conversational content, making it less likely to be cited by AI models.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach includes implementing structured data, creating FAQ content, and enhancing GBP engagement to make your business the top choice for AI-driven searches.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Waiting means losing ground to competitors who are already optimizing for AI search.
